steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Combine and clear fractions: the first becomes $x-12y=-\tfrac{8}{3}$ and the second becomes $x-2py=6$. For no solution, the $y$-coefficients must match: $$-12=-2p.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: Solving gives $p=6$. The constants $-\tfrac{8}{3}$ and $6$ differ, confirming no solution. The answer is 6.
